parameters.query: SELECT ap.*, a.decision FROM action_plans ap JOIN approvals a ON ap.plan_id = a.plan_id WHERE ap.plan_id = '{{$json.plan_id}}' AND a.decision = 'APPROVED';

INSERT INTO actions_executed (plan_id, entity_level, entity_id, action_type, meta_api_call, meta_api_response, status, executed_at) VALUES ('{{$json.plan_id}}', '{{$json.entity_level}}', '{{$json.entity_id}}', '{{$json.action_type}}', '{{JSON.stringify($json)}}'::jsonb, '{{JSON.stringify($json.response)}}'::jsonb, 'EXECUTED', NOW());
UPDATE action_plans SET status = 'REJECTED' WHERE plan_id = '{{$json.plan_id}}';
